name: Tiramisu Parfaits
recipeIngredient: Butter cookie crumbs or cake crumbs - 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place egg whites in a bowl with an electric mixer and put the bowl in a second bowl of hot water. Stir occasionally for 15 minutes.
2. Add cream of tartar and salt to the egg whites. Beat until they just hold stiff peaks.
3. In a saucepan, combine sugar and 1/4 cup water. Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve the sugar, then boil until it registers 240°F on a candy thermometer. Remove from heat.
4. Add the sugar syrup to the egg whites in a stream while beating. Beat until the mixture is cool.
5. Add mascarpone, rum, and chocolate, and beat until well combined.
6. Divide cookie or cake crumbs among 4 stemmed glasses. Drizzle each portion with 2 tablespoons of coffee.
7. Top the crumbs with half the mascarpone mixture. Layer remaining crumbs, coffee, and mascarpone mixture in the same manner.
8. Chill parfaits, covered for a minimum of 2 hours, or overnight.
9. Melt chocolate in a metal bowl set over a pan of barely simmering water.
10. Line a baking sheet with foil and spread the melted chocolate about 1/8 inch thick on the foil. Chill until just set but not hard.
11. Cut into triangles using a pastry wheel.
12. Chill the chocolate triangles until they have hardened. Peel off foil carefully.
13. Garnish each parfait with a chocolate triangle.
